allow:
Bash(cat > /z/matrix-agent/systemd/matrix-driver.service << 'EOF'
[Unit]
Description=Matrix LED Flight Dashboard Driver
After=multi-user.target

[Service]
Type=simple
User=root
WorkingDirectory=/home/pi/matrix-agent
ExecStart=/usr/bin/python3 /home/pi/matrix-agent/driver.py
Restart=always
RestartSec=5
StandardOutput=journal
StandardError=journal

[Install]
WantedBy=multi-user.target
EOF

cat > /z/matrix-agent/systemd/matrix-web.service << 'EOF'
[Unit]
Description=Matrix Flight Dashboard Web Server \(mDNS\)
After=network-online.target
Wants=network-online.target

[Service]
Type=simple
User=pi
WorkingDirectory=/home/pi/matrix-agent
ExecStart=/usr/bin/python3 /home/pi/matrix-agent/server.py
Restart=always
RestartSec=5
StandardOutput=journal
StandardError=journal

[Install]
WantedBy=multi-user.target
EOF
echo "systemd units written: $?")
